---
title: "Cross-Study Quality Summary"
subtitle: "[Review Topic]"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    self-contained: true
---

# Overview

This document summarizes critical appraisal results across multiple studies.

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Review question** | |
| **Checklist used** | |
| **Number of studies** | |
| **Appraiser** | |
| **Date** | |

# Summary Table

| Study | Q1 | Q2 | Q3 | Q4 | Q5 | Q6 | Q7 | Q8 | Q9 | Q10 | Q11 | Overall |
|-------|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|-----|---------|
| Author (Year) | | | | | | | | | | | | |
| Author (Year) | | | | | | | | | | | | |
| Author (Year) | | | | | | | | | | | | |

*Key: Y = Yes, N = No, CT = Can't tell, NA = Not applicable*

# Domain-Level Summary

## Validity

| Criterion | Studies rated Yes | Studies rated No | Studies rated Can't Tell |
|-----------|------------------|------------------|--------------------------|
| | | | |

## Results

| Criterion | Studies rated Yes | Studies rated No | Studies rated Can't Tell |
|-----------|------------------|------------------|--------------------------|
| | | | |

## Applicability

| Criterion | Studies rated Yes | Studies rated No | Studies rated Can't Tell |
|-----------|------------------|------------------|--------------------------|
| | | | |

# Evidence Mapping

| Outcome | Strong evidence (studies) | Moderate evidence (studies) | Weak/absent evidence |
|---------|--------------------------|----------------------------|---------------------|
| | | | |

# Notes

**Patterns observed** (for researcher's interpretation):

**Limitations of the appraisal process**:

---

*AI-assisted note: This summary table was generated with Research Workflow Assistant support. All quality ratings were made by the human appraiser. See individual appraisal reports for detailed evidence and reasoning.*
